title: Write a Compelling Social Media Post for a Travel Company
scenario: Create a social media post for a travel company that showcases a stunning destination and encourages users to share their own travel experiences. The post should be engaging, visually appealing, and include a call-to-action. The post should be under 150 characters, written in a friendly tone, and include relevant hashtags.
constraints: Should include a user-generated content call-to-action

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the prompt adheres to the given constraints.
Evaluate the tone of the social media post, ensuring it is friendly and engaging.
Check if the post is under 150 characters.
Verify that the post includes relevant hashtags.
